packages.title: Per day
packages.description: Book a designer for a day. Ideal for quick tasks.

packages.title: 20 days
packages.description: Consistent design support with weekly syncs and unlimited revisions.

packages.title: 40 days
packages.description: A senior designer embedded in your team, including design system setup.

designSprint.title: Design Sprint
designSprint.description: A structured 4-day process to rapidly solve a design challenge. From problem definition to a tested prototype in less than a week.
features: Day 1: Understand — Map the problem, explore solutions
Day 2: Decide — Choose the best direction, create a storyboard
Day 3: Prototype — Build a realistic, clickable prototype
Day 4: Test — Validate with real users, gather insights
